arts.ttl: Michail Antonio latest as concerning update emerges after West Ham star's car crash
arts.sum: West Ham United's Michail Antonio is facing an uncertain future in football after a severe car accident on Saturday led to surgery for a lower limb fracture. In an official statement, the club said: "West Ham United can confirm Michail Antonio has undergone surgery on a lower limb fracture following a road traffic accident on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: 'Exceptional' manager has already agreed to take the West Ham job with Julen Lopetegui's future uncertain
arts.sum: Is Graham Potter right man for West Ham?

arts.ttl: West Ham host Wolves in a pivotal test for both managers
arts.sum: West Ham host Wolverhampton Wanderers at the London Stadium in an important clash for the managers of the two struggling teams.

arts.ttl: What Allegri told West Ham over coaching job offer
arts.sum: West Ham aren’t pleased with Julen Lopetegui’s work this season and have reportedly opened talks...

arts.ttl: Pundit shares if Lopetegui or O'Neil under more pressure before West Ham v Wolves
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui is under more pressure than Gary O’Neil ahead of the West Ham United and Wolves clash, Aaron Lennon says. The former Tottenham attacker... The post Pundit shares if Lopetegui or O'Neil under more pressure before West Ham v Wolves appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Michail Antonio update, best-case scenario and first words after horror crash
arts.sum: Michail Antonio is in a stable condition in hospital and communicating following his horror car crash but there have been fears he might not play football again after undergoing surgery to a fractured lower limb

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest join West Ham, Southampton in race for 31-goal attacker?
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are reportedly racing West Ham United and Southampton for Brazil international Yuri Alberto, who is preparing to leave South America in January.

arts.ttl: How to watch West Ham vs Wolves
arts.sum: West Ham vs Wolves kicks off at 8pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7.30pm. Live text coverage of West Ham vs Wolves is also being provided on Monday evening as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui and Gary O'Neil in Last Chance Saloon as West Ham host Wolves in 'El Sackico'
arts.sum: Defeat for either Julen Lopetegui or Gary O'Neil when West Ham take on Wolves tonight is expected to spell the end for one head coach following horrible starts to Premier League season
